title: Greek Mythology Origins
description: A specialized Origins addon for fans of Greek Mythology and Percy Jackson. Forge your destiny as a true demigod with unique powers inspired by the gods of Olympus.
body:
![Greek Mythology Origins Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/decfeffd72c387a9d48215671cb01e3a472320a5.png)

⚡ UPDATE: The King of Olympus Arrives! The Child of Zeus has descended! Master this new high-mobility origin to command the winds, call down lightning, and electrocute your enemies.

New Features: Divine Flight, Targeted Lightning Strikes, Static Melee Attacks, and Fall/Lightning Immunity.

🏛️ Greek Mythology Origins
Welcome to the Bunker 9 Forge!

Ever wondered what it's like to be a child of the Greek Gods in Minecraft? This mod is a custom addon for the Origins Mod that introduces several new origins inspired by the legends of Olympus.

✨ Features:
Unique Demigod Origins: Choose from various lineages (more being forged!).

Immersive Abilities: Powers and weaknesses designed to fit each god's lore.

Handcrafted at Bunker 9: A solo project made with passion for fans of mythology and Percy Jackson.

 

🛠️ Requirements:

[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 

[Origins Mod (Fabric version)](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) 

[Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) 

 

 

A note from the creator: "As you can see, I am a beginner developer currently learning the craft of 'forging' mods. This is my first project under the Bunker 9 Forge name, and I am excited to grow and improve with each update. Your feedback is very welcome!"

 

“Keep your head down, and keep forging.”


 

Credits:

Created by Bunker 9 Forge.

Original Origins Mod created by Apace.

Built using the [Origin Creator by MathGeniusZach](https://www.mathgeniuszach.com/apps/origin-creator/).
